n: Expedition: The Top of the Waterfall

steps.t: The treasure of which Ógur spoke may be at the top of the waterfall deep within the cavern known as the Brackwater. Throttólf has asked you to find th…
Throttólf is in the cave called the Brackwater, near the entrance, down a passage from the base of the waterfall. You found the strongbox at the top o…
